rationale: Educ. Code §7.024 governs the Investment Capital Fund grant program for school deregulation. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13. No direct conflict exists.
quote: The investment capital fund consists of money appropriated for purposes of the fund.
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute. Any fiscal impact on school funding would be indirect and handled through separate school finance provisions.
